entry.title: Vercel AI SDK

entry.cardDescription: TypeScript toolkit for AI apps and streaming UI.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Vercel AI SDK is a core building block for TypeScript teams shipping AI interfaces and streaming model interactions.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
